programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: If You Believe
programme.desc: A jaded book editor has nearly given up on happiness, until she bumps her head and gets a visit from her spunky younger self (Hayden Panettiere). Now, the cheerful, carefree seven-year old helps adult Susan rediscover her inner child.

programme.title: Life-Size 2: A Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Grace Manning is in over her head as CEO of Marathon Toys and her wild-child ways are causing the company's stock to plummet. Grace's old Eve doll magically awakes to help get Grace back on track.

programme.title: Santa Baby 2: Christmas Maybe
programme.desc: Santa is in a late-life crisis – he's tired of his responsibilities and is ready to pass on the reins to Mary, his business-minded daughter, who feels torn between the family business and running her own firm in New York City. The situation intensifies when Teri, an ambitious new arrival to the North Pole, sows dissension at the workshop.

programme.title: Thomas Kinkade's Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: Barely out of school and still searching for his voice as an artist, twenty-year-old Thom looks forward to another idyllic holiday in his hometown of Placerville, CA, a rustic hamlet nestled in the Sierra foothills. But this Christmas, Placerville is struggling: the town's tourist industry is failing, Thom's ailing, once-brilliant mentor, Glen, has lost his ability to paint, and Thom's spirited mother, MaryAnne, reveals that she's losing their family home to foreclosure. Faced with so much uncertainty, Thom comes to realize that salvation may lie in the community of friends and loved ones he left behind. With Glen's help, he not only discovers himself as an artist, but helps the entire town of Placerville rediscover the true spirit of the holidays.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: Frank Martin has been pressured into transporting Valentina, the kidnapped daughter of Leonid Vasilev, the head of the Environmental Protection Agency for the Ukraine, from Marseilles through Stuttgart and Budapest until he ends up in Odessa on the Black Sea. Along the way, with the help of Inspector Tarconi, Frank has to contend with the people who strong armed him to take the job, agents sent by Vasilev to intercept him, and the general non-cooperation of his passenger. Despite Valentina's cynical disposition and his resistance to get involved, Frank and Valentina fall for each other, while escaping from one life- threatening situation after another.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: Liam Neeson stars as a man who gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home and works against the clock to stop a deadly attack to save the lives of his fellow train passengers.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Code Name Banshee
programme.desc: A former government assassin (Antonio Banderas) is forced out of hiding when his deadly protege known as Banshee (Jaime King) discovers there is a bounty on his life. To survive, they must fight off the CIA-backed killers coming for them.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Detective Sergeant Tom Brant (Jason Statham, "Crank") is assigned to track down a dangerous serial killer that has been picking off police officers. With his partner, Porter Nash, this killer cop must track down the cop killer.

programme.title: A Royal Night Out
programme.desc: On V.E. Day in 1945, as peace extends across Europe, Princesses Elizabeth and Margaret are allowed out to join the celebrations. It is a night full of excitement, danger and the first flutters of romance.

programme.title: Love On Retreat
programme.desc: When beauty brand Bloom decides to focus on online sales, Jenny must find a way to "live" in "work-life balance" while Nate has already figured it out. When sparks fly between them, there's only one problem - that's his boss's brother.

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Marley Corbett (Kate Hudson) is young, beautiful, and wildly funny, but she's afraid of opening herself up to true love and commitment. Though she uses her humor to prevent matters from getting serious, a life-changing visit to her doctor (Gael Garcia Bernal) sends both of them on an eye-opening adventure of mutual discovery, leading to revelations neither thought possible. Also stars Peter Dinklage, Whoopi Goldberg, Kathy Bates and Rosemarie DeWitt.

programme.title: The Sound of Music
programme.desc: Rodgers and Hammerstein's musical inspired this story of the governess who won the heart of the Von Trapp family and whose courage led them across the Alps in their 1938 flight to freedom.

programme.title: The National Tree
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A man and his son embark on a road trip to transport a Christmas tree.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An out-of-work actress returns to her quaint hometown.

programme.title: The Wishing Tree
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A professor supervises orphan students who have nowhere to go for the holidays.

programme.title: The Town Christmas Forgot
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An upscale, urban family gets stranded in a remote lumber town before Christmas.

programme.title: The Santa Suit
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Drake Hunter has a plan to boost sales for his father's toy company.

programme.title: Match Made in Mistletoe
programme.desc: Emily is hired by a foreign embassy in DC to decorate for their annual ball.

programme.title: Merry Magic Christmas
programme.desc: Taking on a financial case for the local children's theatre, Beth meets Nate.

programme.title: Ancient Recipes with Sohla
programme.desc: Ancient Recipes with Sohla Sohla El-Waylly fries up a batch of the original Dutch colonial donuts.

programme.title: Ancient Recipes with Sohla
programme.desc: Ancient Recipes with Sohla Sohla El-Waylly uncovers the true story of the first Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Eve's Christmas
programme.desc: A busy ad executive who is about to become a partner in her firm.

programme.title: Maps and Mistletoe
programme.desc: Emilia has a last-minute project, designing a treasure map of the North Pole.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: Fallen Hearts' by V.C. Andrews follows Heaven's return to her hometown.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Gates of Paradise
programme.desc: Heaven's daughter, Annie, orphaned, crippled, and longing for her lost family.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Web of Dreams', the last Casteel series novel, unravels the family's mysteries.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: Fallen Hearts' by V.C. Andrews follows Heaven's return to her hometown.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: Industrious high school senior Vee Delmonico (Emma Roberts) is tired of living life on the sidelines. Pressured by her friends, Vee decides to join Nerve, a popular online game that challenges players to accept a series of dares. It's not long before the adrenaline-fueled competition requires her to perform increasingly dangerous stunts. When Nerve begins to take a sinister turn, Vee finds herself in a high-stakes finale that will ultimately determine her entire future.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: A beautiful woman (Marie Avgeropoulos) helps a New York bicycle messenger (Taylor Lautner) who's in hot water with a group of gangsters.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Using his love for comics as inspiration, teenager Dave Lizewski (Aaron Johnson) decides to reinvent himself as a superhero -- despite a complete lack of special powers. Dave dons a costume, dubs himself "Kick-Ass," and gets to work fighting crime. He joins forces with the father/daughter vigilante team of Big Daddy and Hit Girl, then befriends another fledgling crime-fighter called Red Mist (Christopher Mintz-Plasse), but a scheming mobster soon puts their alliance to the test.

programme.title: Gamer
programme.desc: Each week Kable (Gerard Butler), a death-row inmate, battles his fellow prisoners in a violent online game called "Slayers," his every move controlled by a young gamer's remote device. To the players, Kable and the other inmates are just simulated characters. But, to a resistance group that opposes the game's inventor, Kable is a critical component of their plan to end the inventor's form of high-tech slavery.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The battle for Earth continues when college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers and must join in their continued battle against the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay comes the best 'Transformers' ever! With humanity facing extinction from a terrifying new threat, it's up to the Autobots to save Earth. They'll need new allies, including inventor Cade (Mark Wahlberg) and the Dinobots!

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: In 1987, Jordan Belfort takes an entry-level job at a Wall Street brokerage firm. By the early 1990s, while still in his 20s, Belfort founds his own firm, Stratton Oakmont. Together with his trusted lieutenant and a merry band of brokers, Belfort makes a huge fortune by defrauding wealthy investors out of millions. However, while Belfort and his cronies partake in a hedonistic brew of sex, drugs and thrills, the SEC and the FBI close in on his empire of excess.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Billionaire and aviation tycoon Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a successful public figure: a director of big-budget Hollywood films such as "Hell's Angels," a passionate lover of Hollywood leading ladies Katharine Hepburn (Cate Blanchett) and Ava Gardner (Kate Beckinsale), and an aviation pioneer who helps build TWA into a major airline. But in private, Hughes remains tormented, suffering from paralyzing phobias and depression. The higher he rises, the farther has to fall.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: The implausible escape of a brilliant murderess brings U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels (Leonardo DiCaprio) and his new partner (Mark Ruffalo) to Ashecliffe Hospital, a fortress-like insane asylum located on a remote, windswept island. The woman appears to have vanished from a locked room, and there are hints of terrible deeds committed within the hospital walls. As the investigation deepens, Teddy realizes he will have to confront his own dark fears if he hopes to make it off the island alive.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: A cowboy star and a legendary lawman team up to make a movie... and find out it can be murder.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four reluctant heroes form an unlikely alliance in order to rescue the town of Silverado from a nasty sheriff.

programme.title: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: With a terminal diagnosis that has left him with just months to live, insurance salesman Peter (Jerry Lewis) decides to take an extravagant, around-the-world fishing tour. Mid-trip, Peter is informed by his doctor, Scott (Peter Lawford), that a malfunctioning electrocardiograph had caused a misdiagnosis and he will live. Now, faced with crippling debt from his travels, Peter resolves to fake his own death to secure a life insurance claim for his wife, Nancy (Anne Francis).

programme.title: Miss Grant Takes Richmond
programme.desc: Ellen Grant (Lucille Ball) is the worst student at her secretarial school, yet surprisingly, she is hired by real estate agent Dick Richmond (William Holden). It turns out that Dick's real estate office is just a front for a betting operation. When Ellen unknowingly takes a large bet from Dick's old flame, Peggy (Janis Carter), Peggy demands that Dick must either pay up or run off with her. It's up to the dizzy Miss Grant to find a way to extract Dick from this mess.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship in the Army
programme.desc: Lt. Rip Crandall (Jack Lemmon) is entrusted with one of the most important missions of his World War II career: to shuttle an Australian spy (Chips Rafferty) into enemy territory. Unfortunately, he'll be doing it with one of the Navy's least seaworthy vessels, the USS Echo. But even in a clunker of a ship, Crandall and his madcap crew -- including his enthusiastic young ensign (Ricky Nelson) -- do their best to make their ill-equipped mission a success.

programme.title: Only Angels Have Wings
programme.desc: Rough and tough Geoff Carter (Cary Grant) runs a tiny airline that cannot afford to miss any flights, despite the dangers along many of the routes. When Bonnie Lee (Jean Arthur), a performer who is falling for him, sees that Geoff is preparing to fly in violent weather conditions, she takes measures to make him stay. She's successful in her attempt, and two of his employees are forced to make the flight for him -- but Bonnie may have been correct about the potential peril of that flight.

programme.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
programme.desc: Nell is back in the safety of civilization and sent to live in a group home where she's encouraged to leave her past behind and start a new life. Just as Nell settles in, she is tormented by the seductive demonic presence that once possessed her.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The wife of a professor investigates the murder of a beautiful college student who has been appearing to her.

programme.title: The Haunting
programme.desc: In this edge-of-your-seat supernatural thriller featuring Hollywood's hottest stars, a study in fear escalates into a heart-stopping nightmare for a professor and three subjects trapped in a mysterious mansion.

programme.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
programme.desc: Nell is back in the safety of civilization and sent to live in a group home where she's encouraged to leave her past behind and start a new life. Just as Nell settles in, she is tormented by the seductive demonic presence that once possessed her.

programme.title: Christmas Manger
programme.desc: An elderly man struggles with the death of his wife until his estranged foster child and her young daughter re-enter his life and give him a new purpose to live.

programme.title: Stealing Christmas
programme.desc: A burglar (Tony Danza) lands a job playing Santa Claus as he plots to rob a small-town bank on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Same Time, Next Year
programme.desc: In 1951, at a small California inn, George (Alan Alda) and Doris (Ellen Burstyn) have an affair. Instead of writing it off as a one-night stand, the pair decide to meet at the inn every year for a romantic retreat, away from their respective spouses and families. In the decades that follow, both George and Doris face their own personal struggles and hardships, and together they develop a level of love and intimacy that exceeds the ones found in their own marriages.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Katie (Michelle Pfeiffer) and her husband, Ben (Bruce Willis), have grown apart. While they keep up the facade of having a contented marriage, mostly to not worry their children, they aren't happy together and argue frequently. While the kids are away at camp, Katie and Ben decide to separate and try to reassess their relationship to see if they should stay together or split up for good. Can they find enough that's positive in their marriage to keep it going?

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: Returning home for Christmas, a woman (Rachel Boston) develops an unexpected attraction to her best friend from school.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: A Frozen Christmas 2
programme.desc: This Christmas Santa invites many of his friends to the holiday party of the century.

programme.title: A Frozen Christmas 3
programme.desc: Santa's reindeer get the holiday season started by singing their favorite songs.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless for Christmas
programme.desc: After discovering that his latest mark is a single mother who works with the homeless, a con man decides to help make the approaching Christmas a memorable one for her and her son.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: The Terror LIVE
programme.desc: Realizing he is the only way to talk to a seething terrorist a demoted anchor attempts to win back his spot.

programme.title: The Plan Man
programme.desc: A meticulous librarian's love plan is shaken by a free-spirited musician pushing him to face the world.

programme.title: Unforgettable (Dubbed)
programme.desc: After 23 years, a DJ receives a letter from his first love, stirring memories of an unforgettable summer.

programme.title: Love On-Air
programme.desc: Jina the DJ of struggling Wonderful Radio with low ratings teams up with the cold new producer Jae-hyuk.

programme.title: DAEMUGA: The Great Shaman Song
programme.desc: Sin-nam, Chung-dam, Sung-joon battle their skills to seize the redevelopment district and compete to be the best shaman.

programme.title: Once in a summer

programme.title: If The Sun Rises In The West
programme.desc: When a wife becomes the breadwinner of her family after her husband loses his job, adultery becomes part of her life.

programme.title: The Fox Family
programme.desc: A story of a family who are kumiho(nine-tailed) foxes in human form. They are looking for a chance to eat a fresh human liver to be turned back into humans.

programme.title: Clutch
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, a reluctant thief, Martyn (David Hewlett), inadvertently kills a man during the bungled robbery of a rare book. Martyn enlists his friends to get rid of the body, while he delivers the book to a psychotic black market antique dealer. When his car breaks down, he meets Theresa (Tanya Allen), a local mechanic, who tums out to be the girlfriend of the man he has just slain.

programme.title: Fractured
programme.desc: A woman stumbles upon undeniable proof of her husband's infidelity and realizes that truth is stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Induced
programme.desc: An expectant couple heads to a remote cabin to have a natural childbirth, but comes under attack from a predatory midwife who will stop at nothing to snatch their unborn child from them.

programme.title: Meli
programme.desc: After finding an eviction notice on her door, Meli decides it's time to up the ante and take matters into her own hands to protect her family by any means necessary. Out of pure desperation she attempts to burglarize a stranger's luxurious home.

programme.title: Laramie Mountains
programme.desc: A couple of outlaws try to instigate a war to claim gold that has been discovered on Indian land.

programme.title: Two Rode Together
programme.desc: Two adventurers attempt to enter a Comanche camp and peacefully bring back relatives captured years before.

programme.title: The Son Of Davy Crockett

programme.title: The Pathfinder
programme.desc: A British scount is sent to infiltrate a French stronghold and learn their plans for the Great Lakes

programme.title: Lust For Gold

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what's left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang's heyday may be far behind them, but there's still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: Doc

programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.desc: Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Painless Pepper has plans to extract more than teeth.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: An admiral's son helps outlaws steal from the Navy.

programme.desc: Three men try to silence a murder witness.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Owned San Francisco
programme.desc: Jose Limantour claims title to land in the city.

programme.title: Young Billy Young
programme.desc: Fleeing the scene of a gruesome gunfight in Mexico, Billy Young (Robert Walker) arrives in the small town of Lordsburg, where he is promptly deputized by local sheriff Ben Kane (Robert Mitchum). Kane takes the troubled young man under his wing, hoping to reform his lawless ways. As the bond between the two men grows stronger, Kane recruits Young for a particularly personal assignment: to help bring to justice Frank Boone (John Anderson), a vicious outlaw responsible for the death of his son.

programme.title: Man With the Gun
programme.desc: Sheridan City is out of control. The citizens are corrupt, the saloon is an immoral indulgence, and gunmen and greedy opportunists come and go as they please. With the town's lawman (Henry Hull) incapable of maintaining order, the town council brings in a hired gun, Clint Tollinger (Robert Mitchum), who has business of his own with the saloon madame (Jan Sterling). Tollinger sets about proving his reputation as a "town tamer" through his signature approach: eradicating violence with violence.

programme.title: Outlaw Justice
programme.desc: A retired outlaw's (Waylon Jennings) son and old friends (Kris Kristofferson, Willie Nelson) face numerous obstacles in order to avenge his death.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two men fight to rid Virginia City of its corrupt judicial system.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.sub-title: To Big Charlie From Little Charlie
programme.desc: Two prospectors -- both named Charlie -- strike it rich and choose different paths in life.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Sequoia, a Cherokee, is the object of ridicule as he painstakingly tries to develop an alphabet for his people.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The story of Lola Montez, the legendary dancer of the 1800s.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A tenderfoot employed at his fiancee's borax mine must prove himself when the mule team he's working on is robbed and the lead driver shot, leaving him to lead the train to safety and find the stolen payroll.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A man must collect back taxes and hires some muscle for assistance, but a surprise awaits him.

programme.desc: A prospector strikes it rich and decides to marry the girl he left behind, unaware that she's stopped waiting.

programme.desc: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.

programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite.

programme.desc: Texas homesteader Delores Holtz (Cyndy Preston) is kidnapped by an Indian tribe, but refuses rescue when the opportunity comes. She falls in love with the tribe's chief, Running Dog (Raoul Trujillo), preferring him to her abusive husband, Ralph (Chris Wiggins). However, Ralph wants Delores back and plans a raid against the tribe to get her. Stuck in the middle, blood brothers Alan Johnson (Christopher Reeve) and Britt "Black Fox" Johnson (Tony Todd) must choose a side to fight for.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Attacked by Shoshones while crossing a burial ground, Adam discovers that the Indian woman tending him is white.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Little Joe runs into romantic complications when he tries to teach a deaf girl sign language guest Albert Salmi.

programme.desc: Josh saves his quarry from the noose so that he can testify in another town.

But when his wife, Raysha (Morgan Fairchild), leaves him for another man -- in part because she wants to return to Philadelphia -- the reverend decides to replace his spiritual ways with a gun. After shooting down his wife and her lover, he battles a landowner intent on keeping all of the town's water for himself. But his deadly ways make him yearn for a belief in God again.

But Bill soon discovers that Ryan may know more about his tragic past than he has let on.

programme.title: 18 Holes: Swamill Creek
programme.desc: PGA pro Jimmy Hanlin and former LPGA player Danah Bordner visit the newly renovated Sawmill Creek Resort in Sandusky, Ohio. The duo takes viewers through the Tom Fazio–designed course hole by hole, highlighting its generous fairways, scenic par threes, and strategic challenges like marsh carries and doglegs. Along the way, they mix in lighthearted competition, course tips, and local flavor—emphasizing the resort's updates, proximity to Cedar Point, and inviting atmosphere for golfers of all levels. The show blends golf instruction, friendly banter, and a showcase of the resort's amenities, making it both entertaining and informative.

programme.title: The Swing Clinic: Feather Sound 1 of 2
programme.desc: In this episode of The Swing Clinic, PGA pro Jimmy Hanlin and golf influencer Claire Hogle visit Feather Sound Country Club near St. Pete–Clearwater, Florida, for a mix of golf instruction and local flavor. They cover key swing tips like proper weight transfer, preventing early extension, and fixing common driver issues like slicing. Claire also demonstrates drills to help older golfers gain more distance through increased hip rotation and flexibility.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Surf N Turk: Wisconsin Turkey and Carp
programme.desc: Steven Rinella scratches his spring turkey itch this year as he visits Southeast Wisconsin to call in some big eastern Toms with his buddy Jerod Fink. The guys also plan to do some bow fishing after dark so they can enjoy a real Midwest turkey and fish fry.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Best Start - Wild Game Breakfast Cooking Special
programme.desc: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day, but is often overlooked by wild game cooks at home. Following a series of successful hunts across North America this past fall, Steve demonstrates how to cook a variety of breakfast classics using wild game ingredients‚Äîincluding black bear bacon, which Steve has never tried before.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Gila Monster: New Mexico Bull Elk
programme.desc: After four years of waiting, Steven Rinella draws a coveted, limited-entry public land bull elk tag for New Mexico's Gila National Forest. Steve heads into the backcountry on a solo backpack hunt where his biggest challenge is the vast expanse of hills covered in thick timber. This demanding hunt requires lots of glassing and even more hiking. Here, even just one missed opportunity could result in an empty freezer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Hearts of Darkness: Ticker Cooking Special
programme.desc: While it's considered a long-standing hunting tradition to eat the heart of your first kill, the heart is otherwise often underutilized in a wild game chef's repertoire. Using the hearts from a wild boar, mule deer, caribou, moose and elk, Steve shares five of his favorite methods of preparing this underappreciated, nutrient-rich muscle.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater

programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: Morris Buttermaker (Billy Bob Thornton) is a burned-out minor league baseball player who loves to drink and can't keep his hands to himself. His long-suffering lawyer (Marcia Gay Harden) arranges for him to manage a local Little League team, and Buttermaker soon finds himself the head of a rag-tag group of misfit players. Through unconventional team-building exercises and his offbeat coaching style, Buttermaker helps his hapless Bears prepare to meet their rivals, the Yankees.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians, former showgirl Rachel Phelps (Margaret Whitton), has a sweetheart deal to move the team to Miami. But to break the lease with the city of Cleveland, ticket sales have to plummet. So Phelps hires the most incompetent players available, including near-blind pitcher Rick Vaughn (Charlie Sheen) and injury-prone catcher Jake Taylor (Tom Berenger). But her villainous tactics accidentally foster a can-do team spirit, turning the Indians into potential winners.

The monastery is home to a host of orphans whom Nacho cares for deeply, but there is not much money to feed them properly. programme.title: Adam Carolla
programme.desc: Outspoken podcast king and comedian Adam Carolla brings his unique humor to Dry Bar. He delivers his first clean act as he gets real about the absurdities of modern day parenting, unsuccessful rebrands, and what the rich and poor have in common.

programme.title: Shayne Smith
programme.desc: In his second Dry Bar Comedy special, stand-up comedian Shayne Smith delivers more stories about everything from a failed robbery to a wrestling match in the New York Subway, claw machines, Florida headline shenanigans, and even saving the life of a dog.

programme.title: Brad Upton
programme.desc: Brad Upton unleashes his comedic prowess by roasting millennials. With no intention of slowing down, he sets his sights on satirizing lampoon masks, merging, and millionaires. Brad takes the audience on another uproarious comedy ride as he fearlessly tackles these timely subjects, leaving no stone unturned in his quest for laughter.

programme.title: Josh Blue
programme.desc: Following his groundbreaking win on NBC's Last Comic Standing in 2006, Josh Blue has risen through the ranks to become a well-established headliner at venues throughout the world.

programme.title: Greg Morton
programme.sub-title: I Started Out, as a Baby
programme.desc: Greg Morton had only two choices in schoolyard conflicts. Learn the ways of the force, or use his wit to diffuse situations. That wit would soon lead to winning first prize in the, ‘So You Think You're Funny Contest' and the beginning of his stand-up comedy career. He was no longer the shy introverted kid, drawing cartoons in the corner. He had finally found his voice. A voice he would later use to direct and voice over twenty Saturday Morning cartoons. This former mobile disc jockey, who used to play songs at weddings, now sings song parodies on nationally syndicated radio shows, like the Bob and Tom Show. Take his Obama Man, sung to the tune of Candy Man, which has racked up over 4 million hits on YouTube.

programme.title: Jeff Allen: Honor Thy Wife
programme.desc: His Dry Bar Comedy videos have amassed millions of views on social media and other platforms, introducing him to tens of millions of new fans worldwide.

programme.title: Jeff Allen
programme.sub-title: I Can Laugh About it Now
programme.desc: Jeff Allen combines clean, hilarious humor like no other comedian working today. Besides performing at corporate functions and fundraisers, he regularly appears on television, radio, and casinos across the country. Consistently making heroes out of meeting planners, Jeff Allen provides world-class comedy.

programme.title: K-Von
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: Scott Long
programme.desc: Scott Long tosses out sharp and clever lines that remind you of the differences between funny people and true comedic artists.

programme.title: Scott Losse
programme.desc: Scott Losse is a stand-up comedian from Seattle, Washington. He is married and has two chihuahuas. Scott has performed at Portland's Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Sketchfest Seattle, Bumbershoot: Seattle's Music & Arts Festival, Treefort Music Fest and lots of places that aren't festivals. Comedy Clubs. Colleges. Bars. Elks Lodges. He was the winner of the 2013 Northwest Comedy Competition and a Semi-Finalist in the Seattle International Comedy Competition. Scott can be seen on the latest season of Laughs TV on FOX.

programme.desc: Ray and Danny (Gregory Hines, Billy Crystal) are two Chicago police detectives hot on the trail of drug kingpin Julio Gonzales (Jimmy Smits). They manage to nab the drug lord, but the bust is messy, and the two are suspended. While vacationing in Key West, Fla., they decide to retire from the police force and open up a bar. But when they return to Chicago and find out that Gonzales has been released on bail, they vow not to quit the force until the dangerous dealer is behind bars for good.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

When he reveals his new ability to his old mentor (Henry Travers) and his fiancée (Gloria Stuart), it's clear that a side effect of the potion is insanity. Jack goes on a violent rampage, and the police struggle to hunt him down, unable to see their target, while his mentor and his former partner (William Harrigan) desperately try to devise a plan to capture him.

programme.title: Planet 4K
programme.sub-title: South East Asia - From Myanmar to Cambodia
programme.desc: South East Asia offers mysterious old cultures, steaming cook-shops, exotic plants and animals, and monks deep in prayer. A journey through this area reveals everything that life has to offer. We visit Myanmar, where tourism is still in its infancy and undisturbed temples and nature are sights to behold. Then, in Cambodia we find the mysterious temples of Angkor. And finally, we head over to Vietnam to enjoy the beaches, rivers, and Buddhist pagodas.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia - Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The Great Gobi Nationalpark in the southwest of Mongolia is home oft he most fascinationg mammals alive: the wild camels. The arcaic desert, impenetrable and misterious, ist he home of approximately 800 wild camels which are nearly extinct. The Gobi is one of the most sparsely populated areas around the world. We experience humans which live in the rough and misanthropic desert: Jangaa who breeds camels and specialises in camel polo Surendjav who owns a salt mine Erdene who built an oasis in the middle of the dessert.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: Travel to the extreme south to experience one of Earth's most diverse regions.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gaoligongshan Park: China - Himalaya's Gold
programme.desc: In western China, along the border to Tibet is the Baima Snow Mountain reserve. Both humans and animals have to be persistant, willpowered and strong to be able to survive in over 3000 metres height. The Baima snow mountain reserve is one of the most mysterious and impenetrable regions of the world, full of breathtaking beauty and contrasts.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Flashflood Gates Are Open!
programme.desc: Weather has always been here, from long before arrived, and it will stick around long after we are gone. This unstoppable force has both enhanced and ruined people's days since the dawn of time...but it also creates some incredible situations. Lucky for you, we've captured some of the best for you to see. Strap in and prepare yourself, because it's time once again for Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway
programme.desc: Are you ready for some electricyfing weather videos? Because we've got it all...wind storms, flashfloods, and even hurricanes! We've pulled together some of the craziest weather you've ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
programme.desc: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let's get ready to ride!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Cloudy With a Chance of Hurricanes
programme.desc: MOTHER NATURE UNPREDICTABLE, POWERFUL AND MESMERIZING. ANYTHING CAN CHANGE IN A SPLIT SECOND. FROM HEAVY RAIN, TO HAIL THE SIZE OF BASEBALLS, GIANT TORNADOS, AND WILDFIRES ENCAPSULATING THOUSANDS OF ACRES OF LAND, THIS IS JUST ANOTHER DAY HERE ON EXTREME WEATHER COUNTDOWN.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm
programme.desc: You better board up the windows and secure all the doors, because Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be, with some of the most electrifying, fiercest, and extreme weather videos you have ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow
programme.desc: Today's forecast is quite the doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure. No, it's not the end of the world...it's just another day here on Extreme Weather Countdown! j

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
programme.desc: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow
programme.desc: Do you ever wish you could see all the wackiest weather from around the world, without moving a muscle or lifting a finger? Your wish is our command here on a brand new episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Animals Around the World
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn about Dogs, Cats and More
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein

programme.title: Baby Einstein

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: TOBOT

The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña

programme.title: Soy tu dueña

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement. The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.” “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: Laurent de Wilde
programme.desc: Jazz à Vienne is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981, it has attracted a mix of jazz legends and exciting newcomers, with many of them playing return engagements. Each year welcomes outstanding international stars to the historical Le Théâtre Antique to impress and inspire their audiences. In 2017, French pianist Laurent de Wilde performed his tribute to jazz icon Thelonious Monk at Jazz à Vienne. Alongside bassist Jérôme Regard and drummer Donald Kontomanou, De Wilde gives a respectful and engaging homage built upon 20 years of study.

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley, Nat Adderley, Yusuf Lateef & Joe Zawinul
programme.desc: Cannonball Adderley: Live in '63 boasts two beautifully filmed concerts from one of the most celebrated sextets in jazz history, captured at the top of their game. Cannonball Adderley (alto sax), Nat Adderley (cornet), and the masterful Yusef Lateef (tenor sax, flute, oboe), provide a massive three-horn frontline attack, while the stellar rhythm section featuring a pre-Weather Report Joe Zawinul (piano), Sam Jones (bass), and Louis Hayes (drums) fuel the songs with a deep infectious swing. Quincy Jones' "Jessica's Day" leaps from the gate with a huge big band sound that is extraordinary for only six musicians. This recording is a reminder that Cannonball Adderley was one of the most outstanding and highly respected alto saxophonists in the history of jazz. He was a bluesy jazzman who could play anything in superb fashion.

programme.title: Rahsaan Roland Kirk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: James Brown
programme.sub-title: James Brown - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1981, legendary American singer James Brown gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. The "Godfather of Soul", "Mr. Dynamite", and "Soul Brother No. 1" was a major force in 20th century popular music, influencing many musicians in numerous genres.

programme.title: Omer Avital
programme.sub-title: Omer Avital Qantar - Jazz in Duketown
programme.desc: Jazz in Duketown is the largest free outdoor jazz festival in the Netherlands. It's a real gathering for jazz addicts, inviting internationally renowned artists. Israeli-American double bassist Omer Avital plays radiantly energetic, resounding jazz with oriental influences. At Jazz in Duketown 2019, Avital forms a quintet with saxophonists Asaf Yuria and Alexander Levin, drummer Ofri Nehemya, and pianist Eden Ladin. They present singular repertoire from Avital's album 'Qantar'.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 2 in G major, Op. 18, No. 2 String Quartet No. 16 in F major, Op. 135 and String Quartet No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 131. This concert was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on December 16, 2020.

programme.title: Roberto Abbado, Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma & Eleonora Buratto
programme.desc: Roberto Abbado conducts the Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, the Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma, and four vocal soloists in an outstanding performance of Giuseppe Verdi's Messa da Requiem, recorded at the Parco Ducale di Parma, Italy as part of Festival Verdi 2020. The soloists are soprano Eleonora Buratto, mezzosoprano Anita Rachvelishvili, tenor Giorgio Berrugi, and bass Roberto Tagliavini. When his fellow composer Gioachino Rossini died in 1868, Verdi proposed to compose a ‘Messa per Rossini' in his honor, to be written by himself and several other Italian composers. Verdi wrote the concluding movement, ‘Libera me'. When the premiere was cancelled, the project lay dormant. When Italian poet Alessandro Manzoni passed away a few years later, Verdi revisited his plan to compose a requiem – this time in honor of the poet he so greatly admired. As an opera composer, Verdi knew better than anyone how to infuse the work with drama, as is evident in the revised version of his ‘Libera me'. The famous, powerful ‘Dies Irae' especially stands out, depicting the horrors of the Last Judgement.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Vadim Yarkov
programme.desc: This stunning performance of theatrical ice dancing brings viewers into the enchanting world of Tchaikovsky's magnificent holiday classic, The Nutcracker On Ice, performed by the internationally renowned Imperial Ice Stars, and including former champion figure skaters, Vadim Yarkov and Olga Sharutenko. This very special performance and soundtrack was performed by the Manchester Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Tim A. Duncan, and filmed live in Cape Town, South Africa in 2011.

programme.title: Mariss Jansons, Berliner Philharmoniker & Emmanuel Pahud
programme.desc: Joseph Haydn (1732-1809): Symphony No. 94 in G major "Surprise" - Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (1756-1791): Flute Concerto in D major, K. 314 - Hector Berlioz (1803-1869): Symphonie fantastique Op. 14. Emmanuel Pahud (flute), Berliner Philharmoniker conductor: Mariss Jansons. The European Concert has been a tradition of the Berliner Philharmoniker since 1991. The musicians commemorate the anniversary of the orchestra's founding on May 1st, 1882, playing in different European cities. This concert was recorded in the church "Hagia Eirene" in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.desc: Roy Orbison nicknamed the Big O, was an American singer-songwriter and musician, known for his distinctive, impassioned voice, complex compositions and dark emotional ballads. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Roy Orbison.
